description: This is a bank check, used to pay money to people or business

date.instruction: The date the check has been signed. Reformat to YYYY-MM-DD

amount_in_words.instruction: The amount in words, as written. Make sure to add cents at the end. Example: One Hundred Dollars and - 55 cents

dollar_amount.instruction: The dollar amount in numbers, as written

payee_name.instruction: To whom the check is addressed

memo.instruction: The memo that describe what the check was for
